title: Feature: v2 Swarm-Controlled Quality Orchestration — HexFlo drives compile/test/analyze/fix loop
description: Migrate quality loop from embedded validate_phase.rs logic to HexFlo swarm-controlled orchestration. Each quality gate and fix attempt becomes a tracked swarm task with agent assignment, cost tracking, and dashboard visibility. Swarm topology encodes hex architecture rules (tier ordering, parallel within tier, gate after each tier).

phases.name: Quality Gate Tasks
phases.description: Extract quality gates into standalone swarm task types

phases.name: Fix Agent Tasks
phases.description: Fix attempts as tracked swarm tasks with agent assignment

phases.name: Hex-Pipeline Topology
phases.description: New swarm topology that encodes hex architecture tier rules

phases.name: Coordinator Intelligence
phases.description: HexFlo coordinator drives the loop, spawns agents, enforces Grade A

phases.name: Dashboard & Reporting
phases.description: Real-time visibility into quality loop execution

steps.description: Define QualityGateTask type in hexflo-coordination WASM module. Fields: task_id, gate_type (compile/test/analyze), target_dir, language, status (pending/running/pass/fail), score, violations_count, error_output (first 4KB). New table + reducer in SpacetimeDB.

Define FixTask type in hexflo-coordination WASM module. Fields: task_id, gate_task_id (which gate failed), fix_type (compile/test/violation), target_file, error_context, model_used, tokens, cost_usd, status, result. Links fix attempts to the gate that triggered them.

Add REST endpoints for quality gate and fix tasks: POST /api/hexflo/quality-gate (create gate task), PATCH /api/hexflo/quality-gate/:id (update result), POST /api/hexflo/fix-task (create fix task), GET /api/hexflo/quality-gate/:id/fixes (list fixes for a gate).

Implement QualityGateAgent — a reusable agent definition that runs compile + test + hex analyze on a target directory and reports results back to HexFlo. Can be spawned by the swarm coordinator as a task. Reads gate_type to decide which checks to run.

Implement FixAgent — a reusable agent that takes a FixTask, loads the appropriate prompt template (fix-compile/fix-tests/fix-violations), calls inference, writes the fixed file, and reports result back to HexFlo. Each fix is a separate tracked task.

Add hex-pipeline topology to HexFlo. This topology encodes hexagonal architecture rules: tiers 0-4 execute in order, tasks within a tier run in parallel, a quality gate runs after each tier completes, the next tier is blocked until the gate passes. Different from generic 'pipeline' which is purely sequential.

Update hex dev workplan-to-swarm mapping. When creating a swarm from a workplan, use hex-pipeline topology. Group tasks by tier. After each tier's tasks complete, auto-create a quality gate task. The swarm status shows per-tier progress with gate results.

Implement SwarmQualityCoordinator in hex-nexus. This component watches for quality gate task completions via SpacetimeDB subscription. On gate failure: creates FixTask(s) — one per violation/error. On fix completion: re-creates the quality gate task. Enforces max 3 iterations per gate. Updates swarm status with current grade.

Add Grade A enforcement to swarm completion logic. A hex-pipeline swarm cannot be marked 'completed' unless the final quality gate passed with Grade A (or Grade B in auto mode). The swarm status shows the current grade prominently. hex swarm status shows the grade.

Parallel fix execution. When multiple violations exist, the coordinator creates multiple FixTasks that can run concurrently (mesh sub-topology within the fix phase). Each fix agent works on a different file. After all fixes complete, re-gate. This is faster than sequential fixes.

Dashboard: Quality Gate panel. Subscribe to QualityGateTask and FixTask tables via SpacetimeDB WebSocket. Show per-tier gate status (pass/fail/in-progress), fix attempts with cost, current grade with color coding (A=green, B=yellow, C/D/F=red). Live updates as gates and fixes execute.

Update hex report to read quality data from SpacetimeDB (QualityGateTask + FixTask tables) instead of session.quality_result. Show per-tier gate results, per-fix attempt details (model, cost, file, before/after). JSON output includes the full quality trail. Fallback to session file if SpacetimeDB unavailable.
